examples: It is just a public relations gimmick.
It was no more than a passing gimmick or a fairground attraction.
If a poster says "A unique show with predatory apes – hamadryas baboons" we will just smile to this "promotional gimmick".
Some might say pairing a pop band with the Stratford is a marketing gimmick.
But that's almost all a timing gimmick, accelerating tax collections without altering anybody's cumulative tax bill.
